mapper.insert: INSERT INTO options ( f_code, o_select, o_text, o_count, o_price, o_important, o_code ) VALUES ( #{f_code}, #{o_select}, #{o_text}, #{o_count}, #{o_price}, #{o_important}, #{o_code} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rnum, data.* FROM ( SELECT f_code, o_select, o_text, o_count, o_price, o_important, o_code FROM options WHERE ${searchKey} LIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' ORDER BY f_code DESC ) data ) WHERE rnum >= #{param1} AND rnum <= #{param2}
SELECT f_code, o_select, o_text, o_count, o_price, o_important, o_code FROM options WHERE f_code = #{f_code}
SELECT f_code, o_select, o_text, o_count, o_price, o_important, o_code FROM options WHERE f_code = #{f_code} ORDER BY o_important DESC, o_select ASC, o_price ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE options SET o_select = #{o_select}, o_text = #{o_text}, o_count = #{o_count}, o_price = #{o_price}, o_important = #{o_important} WHERE o_code = #{o_code}
